name: subagent-judge

defaults.rubric: Judge evidence preservation, severity calibration, consensus purity, internal consistency, and merge bias.
defaults.evidence: Use the provided raw outputs or artifact paths; mark any missing evidence.
defaults.output_format: Markdown sections: Verdict, Issues, Evidence Preservation, Bias Risks, Required Fixes.

template: pi -p --model {model} --thinking {thinking} {tool_args} Judge this report: {report}. Rubric: {rubric}. Evidence: {evidence}. Output format: {output_format}
